channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Abandoned car just hidding., 7th July
item.description:
Has been parked up in one of the evenings for more than 3 weeks ago, and has never moved or visited since, only holding the locals' parking space.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dudlington Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 black bags of broken tiles dumped on pavement outside number 70, 7th July
item.description:
This was dumped last night.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benares Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: By railway Claremont road, 7th July
item.description:
Lots of old wooden pallets and furniture plus black bin bags dumped in corner by railway Claremont road - we need cctv here to monitor this dumping hotspot

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Claremont Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Concrete/ bricks in bushes, 7th July
item.description:
Concrete in bushes to the left of entrance to the woods, also litter along that fence line and scrap metal by bin. Also bags dumped to the right of woods entrance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castlecombe Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trash everywhere, again, 7th July
item.description:
Horrible waste including food dumped at same spot again

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two disfunctional drains on public path, 7th July
item.description:
Two drains on the public path outside 3 Bowen Drive - one is filled up and crumbling, the other is filled up with dirt and doesn't drain efficiently when raining (puddle forming). There are also signs of asphalt breaking next to one of them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hunts Slip Road, Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked drain on Scotts Lane, corner of Oakwood Avenue near 367 bus stop, 7th July
item.description:
All the drains down this area of the road are blocked. With recent heavy rainfall this has resulted in flooding on the corner of Oakwood Avenue and Scott's Lane... Also backing up of water which has then risen out of manholes further up the road in Oakwood Avenue.. Shown in picture 3

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Scott's Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large willow limb hanging over horse field, 7th July
item.description:
Willow limb suspended in horse field next to scadbury cottages. Young horses gathering underneath limb so there is a danger if this drops

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain blocked with rubbish and vegetation, 7th July
item.description:
All the drains down this area of the road are blocked. With recent heavy rainfall this has resulted in flooding on the corner of Oakwood Avenue and Scott's Lane... Also backing up of water which has then risen out of manholes further up the road in Oakwood Avenue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Oakwood Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Everywhere, 7th July
item.description:
There is a persistent problem with overflowing bins and excessive rubbish on the pavement. When will you deal with the issue? The street is currently filthy and it is a health hazard.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): College Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Victoria north side between Lynton and honiton next to a tree, 7th July
item.description:
2 bags and a box. One bag and box with builders canisters were fly tipped I just brought them together. The second bag contains street litter I have picked on Brondesbury Victoria and Donaldson

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: 3 abandoned Lime bikes in Westgate Road, 7th July
item.description:
3 Lime bikes have been abandoned in Westgate Road, between Foxgrove Road and Beckenham Place Park. Two of them are outside Langstead Wood House (see photo), the other one a bit nearer Foxgrove Road, all on the west side of Westgate Road. Please can they be removed - thanks!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westgate Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Installation of new public litter bin next to bus stop, 7th July
item.description:
There is constant litter around the bus stop. One of the reasons for this is that there is no public litter bin anywhere near. The closest 2 are at St Marys Cray Station and half way up leesons hill. This is a bus stop and should have a public bin.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118A, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very large tree, 7th July
item.description:
Very large willow tree has started leaning and could go on to property opposite
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackmore Road, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The pile of things outside Vale Lodge has grown, 7th July
item.description:
Added items. Single bed frame, single mattress, computer chair. Subtracted item. Folding single bed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dacres Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dump, 7th July
item.description:
This alleyway has been used as a dumping ground for years. It is totally unslightly and no doubt hazardous. It is a stain on the prime shopping and restaurant location of market square.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Voi bike in Foxgrove Road/Westgate Road junction., 7th July
item.description:
A Voi bike has been abandoned by the north-East corner of the junction of Foxgrove Road and Westgate Road. Please can it be removed - thanks!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxgrove Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willow, 7th July
item.description:
Huge willow with exposed roots. Looks like it's going to fall on a property
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blackmore Road, Doddinghurst, Brentwood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated fly-tipping of bags and cardboard on the pavement, 7th July
item.description:
Waste has been dumped on the public footway at this spot on more than one occasion. Today there are several bin bags plus cardboard, which appears to be household rather than commercial waste, and one piece of cardboard shows a private resi

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Absndoned Lime Bike in The Avenue/Westgate Road junction, 7th July
item.description:
A Lime bike was abandoned last week at the junction of Westgate Road and The Avenue (north-western corner). It is still there this morning. Please can it be removed - thanks!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Avenue, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
